clauses.text: Provider guarantees 99.95% monthly uptime for all Tier 1 (production) services.
Severity 1 (Critical): Response within 15 minutes, resolution target 4 hours.
Monthly uptime below 95.00%: 50% credit of monthly service fees.
Monthly service fee: $45,000. Payment terms: Net-30.
Client may terminate without penalty if Provider fails 99.95% uptime for three consecutive months.
This SLA shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
